rules.title: README required
rules.description: The target repo should have a README.md.

rules.title: Agent instructions required
rules.description: The target repo should have an AGENTS.md.

rules.title: CI workflow required
rules.message: .github/workflows must contain at least one .yml or .yaml workflow
rules.description: The target repo should have a CI workflow under .github/workflows.

rules.title: Go module required
rules.message: Go projects must include a go.mod file
rules.description: Go projects should be Go modules.

rules.title: Go tests required
rules.message: Go projects must declare go test ./... in CI or scripts
rules.description: Go projects should run go test against ./... in an inspectable workflow or script.

rules.title: Go vet required
rules.message: Go projects must declare go vet ./... in CI or scripts
rules.description: Go projects should run go vet ./... in an inspectable workflow or script.

rules.title: Go lint required
rules.message: Go projects must configure and declare golangci-lint
rules.description: Go projects should configure golangci-lint and declare a lint check in CI or scripts.

rules.title: Go coverage gate required
rules.message: Go projects must declare a coverage gate
rules.description: Go projects should enforce coverage with go test coverage output, go tool cover, and a minimum threshold.

rules.title: Go complexity linting required
rules.message: Go projects must enable a complexity linter
rules.description: Go projects should enable a complexity linter through golangci-lint.

rules.title: Go DRY check required
rules.description: Go projects should declare dry4go for structural duplicate detection.

rules.title: Go CRAP check required
rules.description: Go projects should declare crap4go for complexity and coverage risk scoring.

rules.title: Go mutation check required
rules.description: Go projects should declare mutate4go in an inspectable workflow or script.
